# Custom Agents

This folder contains curated agents selected for this repository.

**Installed Agents:**
- `agentic-brain-installer.agent.md` - framework setup and phase configuration
- `agentic-brain-asset-curator.agent.md` - curated asset selection and import
- `gem-orchestrator.agent.md` - orchestration and sequencing
- `critical-thinking.agent.md` - assumption and scope validation
- `api-architect.agent.md` - architecture and API design review
- `typescript-mcp-expert.agent.md` - TypeScript implementation guidance
- `playwright-tester.agent.md` - test strategy and browser validation
- `se-security-reviewer.agent.md` - security review and risk checks
- `github-actions-expert.agent.md` - CI/CD and workflow hardening

---
*Curated via Agentic Brain template installation*
